scripts.dev: pnpm run build:packages && pnpm --filter jotai-transport-example run dev
scripts.server: pnpm run build:packages && pnpm --filter jotai-transport-example run server
scripts.client: pnpm run build:packages && pnpm --filter jotai-transport-example run client
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run build:packages && pnpm -r run typecheck
scripts.verify: pnpm run check && pnpm run build
